name: setup-soldr-cache-compress
description: JS post-action that tar+zstd compresses a cache directory before actions/cache uploads it, and decompresses on restore.

scripts.build:main: ncc build src/main.js -o dist-main --license licenses.txt --no-source-map-register && node -e "require('fs').copyFileSync('dist-main/index.js','dist/main.js')"
scripts.build:post: ncc build src/post.js -o dist-post --license licenses.txt --no-source-map-register && node -e "require('fs').copyFileSync('dist-post/index.js','dist/post.js')"
scripts.build: npm run build:main && npm run build:post
